Class GTNetModelRegistry

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.GTNetModelRegistry
@Component public class GTNetModelRegistry extends Object
Registry mapping GTNet message codes to their payload model classes and metadata. This registry provides a unified mechanism for both core library message models and application-specific message models. Registration is done via Spring bean initialization.

Usage

// In Spring configuration or @PostConstruct
modelRegistry.registerModel(GNetCoreMessageCode.GT_NET_MAINTENANCE_ALL_C, MaintenanceMsg.class, false, (byte) 10);
See Also:
  • for the message code interface

      public static final String MESSAGE_TO_ALL
      Pattern in message code name indicating broadcast to all applicable domains.

  • Constructor Details

    • GTNetModelRegistry

      public GTNetModelRegistry()
      Creates the registry. Core message models are NOT registered here - they should be registered via a configuration class that has access to the model classes.

  • Method Details

    • registerModel

      public void registerModel(GTNetMessageCode messageCode, Class<?> model, boolean responseExpected, byte repeatSendAsMany)
      Registers a message model.
      Parameters:
      messageCode - the message code
      model - the model class (can be null for messages with no payload)
      responseExpected - true if sender should wait for a response
      repeatSendAsMany - retry count for delivery attempts

    • registerModel

      public void registerModel(GTNetMessageCode messageCode, Class<?> model, boolean responseExpected)
      Registers a message model with default retry count of 1.
      Parameters:
      messageCode - the message code
      model - the model class (can be null for messages with no payload)
      responseExpected - true if sender should wait for a response

    • getModel

      public GTNetModelRegistry.GTNetMsgRequest getModel(GTNetMessageCode messageCode)
      Looks up the model class and response expectation for a given message code.
      Parameters:
      messageCode - the message code to look up
      Returns:
      the GTNetMsgRequest with model class and response flag, or null if not registered

    • getModelByValue

      public GTNetModelRegistry.GTNetMsgRequest getModelByValue(byte codeValue)
      Looks up a model by message code byte value.
      Parameters:
      codeValue - the byte value of the message code
      Returns:
      the GTNetMsgRequest, or null if not found

    • getAllModels

      public Map<GTNetMessageCode, GTNetModelRegistry.GTNetMsgRequest> getAllModels()
      Returns all registered message codes.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map of all registrations

    • getClientInitiatableModels

      public Map<GTNetMessageCode, GTNetModelRegistry.GTNetMsgRequest> getClientInitiatableModels()
      Returns only client-initiatable message codes with non-null models.
      Returns:
      map of message codes ending with "_C" that have model classes

    • hasModel

      public boolean hasModel(GTNetMessageCode messageCode)
      Checks if a message code is registered.
      Parameters:
      messageCode - the message code to check
      Returns:
      true if registered
